successful_alumni.ranking_basis: Curated from official Dartmouth Alumni stories and podcasts, prioritizing person-specific profiles with explicit class-year evidence and substantive post-graduation impact.
successful_alumni.source_summary: Extracted from official Dartmouth Alumni stories on alumni.dartmouth.edu.

items.name: Kaya Thomas
items.bio: Dartmouth Alumni says Kaya Thomas ’17 founded Milk Diary after becoming a new parent and previously created We Read Too to help readers discover books by and about people of color.
items.description: Software developer and founder of Milk Diary and We Read Too.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Dartmouth Alumni person-specific feature page with explicit class-year evidence and substantive post-graduation summary.

items.name: Nick Gutierrez
items.bio: Dartmouth Alumni says Nick Gutierrez ’16 TH’16 completed Dartmouth’s demanding dual engineering path and reflects on the workload and value of the Thayer experience.
items.description: Engineering alumnus featured in Dartmouth’s Thayer scholarship campaign story.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Dartmouth Alumni person-specific story with explicit class-year evidence.

items.name: Lucas Katler
items.bio: Dartmouth Alumni says Lucas Katler ’15 became a Tony Award-winning producer and now runs his own production company in New York City.
items.description: Tony Award-winning producer and theater entrepreneur.
items.major: History and Italian modified with theater
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Dartmouth Alumni person-specific feature page with explicit class-year evidence and career summary.

items.name: Mateo Romero
items.bio: Dartmouth Alumni describes Mateo Romero ’89 as an acclaimed visual artist whose work preserves, documents, and celebrates Indigenous culture.
items.description: Visual artist and member of the Cochiti Pueblo Tribe.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Dartmouth Alumni podcast/story page with explicit class-year evidence and substantive career summary.

items.name: Ricki Fairley
items.bio: Dartmouth Alumni says Ricki Fairley ’78 turned her experience with breast cancer into advocacy work that educates industry and helps Black women combat the disease.
items.description: Breast cancer advocate and communications leader.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Dartmouth Alumni podcast/story page with explicit class-year evidence and substantive impact summary.

items.name: Hung Raghavan
items.bio: Dartmouth Alumni says Hung Raghavan ’99 is making a planned gift to Dartmouth and reflects on how significant the College was in her life and family story.
items.description: Alumna and philanthropic supporter of Dartmouth.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Dartmouth Alumni feature page with explicit class-year evidence.

items.name: Sharat Raghavan
items.bio: Dartmouth Alumni says Sharat Raghavan ’98 is making a planned gift to Dartmouth and describes it as a meaningful way to contribute to the College.
items.description: Alumnus and philanthropic supporter of Dartmouth.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Dartmouth Alumni feature page with explicit class-year evidence.

items.name: Peter Pappas
items.bio: Dartmouth Alumni says Peter Pappas ’58 built a long career in chemistry and later used charitable remainder unitrusts to benefit both his family and Dartmouth.
items.description: Chemist, academic, and charitable supporter of Dartmouth.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Dartmouth Alumni feature page with explicit class-year evidence and career summary.

items.name: Ann Fritz Hackett
items.bio: Dartmouth Alumni says Ann Fritz Hackett ’76 was part of Dartmouth’s first fully coeducational class and reflects on helping the institution change from the beginning.
items.description: Member of Dartmouth’s first matriculated coeducational class and Centennial Circle alumna.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Dartmouth Alumni feature page with explicit class-year evidence.

items.name: Martha Johnson Beattie
items.bio: Dartmouth Alumni says Martha Johnson Beattie ’76 was among the women in Dartmouth’s first matriculated coeducational class and a member of the Centennial Circle.
items.description: Member of Dartmouth’s first matriculated coeducational class and Centennial Circle alumna.
items.evidence_quality_note: Official Dartmouth Alumni feature page with explicit class-year evidence.

override_warnings: Dartmouth alumni depth was manually improved because the generic Wikipedia pipeline only produced 5 alumni items.
This override uses official Dartmouth Alumni stories with explicit class-year evidence for stronger person-specific coverage.
